caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Bring Heavy Rain
caribbean.paragraph: Freeport in the Bahamas is experiencing 17 kt winds with 3.0 ft wave heights and an 88% rain probability, while St. Maarten is seeing winds of 20 kt. The Eastern Caribbean will have less turbulent conditions compared to the heavy rain expected in the Bahamas, with St. Maarten being the secondary area of concern.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Conditions: Dubrovnik
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik in the Central Mediterranean is the highest-impact location in the Mediterranean this period, with winds peaking at 17 kt and seas building to 4.5 ft with W swell at 5s periods. 38% rain probability -- isolated showers possible but conditions remain manageable.
